prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a graceful East Asian woman, Anri, standing outdoors among ancient Greek temple ruins on a sunny day. She is centered in a waist-up to mid-thigh composition, facing the camera with a calm, elegant expression and a soft closed-mouth smile. She has shoulder-length dark brown softly layered bob with a side part, smooth fair skin, natural makeup, defined eyes, rosy cheeks, and muted pink lips. She wears a slightly sheer crisp white button-up blouse with the collar open and sleeves rolled to the forearms, tucked into high-waisted cream trousers with pleats, side pockets, and a cream belt with a round gold buckle. Add delicate gold accessories: two dangling earrings, layered thin necklaces, and a small crescent pendant. The background shows sunlit marble columns, temple entablature, stone blocks, steps, and scattered ruins, softly blurred with shallow depth of field; blue sky with light clouds above. Use natural daylight, warm highlights, realistic fabric texture, subtle wind in the hair and blouse, high-resolution fashion travel photography, 85mm portrait lens look, soft bokeh, balanced exposure, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a graceful East Asian woman, Anri, standing outdoors among ancient Greek temple ruins on a sunny day. She is centered in a waist-up to mid-thigh composition, facing the camera with a calm, elegant expression and a soft closed-mouth smile. She has shoulder-length dark brown softly layered bob with a side part, smooth fair skin, natural makeup, defined eyes, rosy cheeks, and muted pink lips. She wears a slightly sheer crisp white button-up blouse with the collar open and sleeves rolled to the forearms, tucked into high-waisted cream trousers with pleats, side pockets, and a cream belt with a round gold buckle. Add delicate gold accessories: two dangling earrings, layered thin necklaces, and a small crescent pendant. The background shows sunlit marble columns, temple entablature, stone blocks, steps, and scattered ruins, softly blurred with shallow depth of field; blue sky with light clouds above. Use natural daylight, warm highlights, realistic fabric texture, subtle wind in the hair and blouse, high-resolution fashion travel photography, 85mm portrait lens look, soft bokeh, balanced exposure, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级写实的竖构图肖像，主角是一位优雅的东亚女性，Anri，在阳光明媚的日子里伫立在古希腊神庙遗址中。她位于画面中央，构图为半身至大腿中部，正对镜头，表情平静优雅，嘴角带着柔和的微笑。她留着 及肩深棕色柔和层次感波波头，侧分，皮肤白皙光滑，妆容自然，眼部轮廓清晰，双颊红润，唇色为柔和的粉色。她身着一件略显透明的挺括白色衬衫，领口敞开，袖子卷至前臂，下摆塞进高腰奶油色长裤中，裤子带有褶皱、侧袋以及配有圆形金扣的奶油色腰带。搭配精致的金色配饰：两只垂坠耳环、叠戴的细项链以及一个小巧的新月形吊坠。背景展示了阳光照耀下的大理石柱、神庙檐部、石块、台阶和散落的遗址，背景经过柔化处理，呈现出浅景深效果；上方是蓝天和淡淡的云朵。采用自然日光，暖色调高光，真实的织物纹理，头发和衬衫随风轻拂，高分辨率时尚旅行摄影风格，85mm 人像镜头质感，柔和的焦外成像，曝光平衡，无文字，无水印，无无关人员。
